mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted, new_user_days, new_user_days_v2, new_in_group_days, badge_bg_new_user, badge_bg_regular, is_lianghao, is_vip, new_user_join_days, friend_apply_count, new_user_create_group_days, new_user_create_group_member_count, create_group_count, login_second_verify_min_pass, scan_login_check_im_code, vip_redeem_enabled, vip_purchase_enabled
mapper.select:
select
from t_credit_score_avatar_display_config where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select
from t_credit_score_avatar_display_config where is_deleted = 0 order by id desc limit 1
